accepted_findings.issue: Protected student follow-up notes would be sent to a third-party model provider by default.
accepted_findings.evidence: guardian_owl:G-PRIV-001 cites attendance and follow-up notes sent to OpenRouter without field exclusion or opt-in.
accepted_findings.impact: Protected internal student data could leave the trusted boundary.
accepted_findings.required_builder_action: Exclude sensitive fields by default, require explicit opt-in, and add a negative test.

builder_instructions: Apply the blocking privacy boundary fix before finalizing.
